title: Carl Horn
wikitext:
{{stub}}

'''Carl Gustav Horn''' is the editor of the [[Neon Genesis Evangelion (manga)|Neon Genesis Evangelion manga]] for the English language. He has worked in editing and localization of several manga and anime, including several Eva spin-offs such as [[Shinji Ikari Raising Project]], as well as several other Gainax works like ''Gunbuster'' and ''Wings of Honneamise'', plus several other anime and manga. 

Horn's [https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/people.php?id=12760 Anime News Network wiki page]

He is also active in online fandom. He even has an [https://forum.evageeks.org/memberlist.php?mode=viewprofile&u=164 EvaGeeks forum account], in which he was active for many years, since the forum's founding in 2004.

[[Category:Evangelion Staff]]
[[Category:A to Z]]
{{Template:Staff}}
html:
This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!


Carl Gustav Horn is the editor of the Neon Genesis Evangelion manga for the English language. He has worked in editing and localization of several manga and anime, including several Eva spin-offs such as Shinji Ikari Raising Project, as well as several other Gainax works like Gunbuster and Wings of Honneamise, plus several other anime and manga.

Horn's Anime News Network wiki page

He is also active in online fandom. He even has an EvaGeeks forum account, in which he was active for many years, since the forum's founding in 2004.

He has worked in editing and localization of several manga and anime, including several Eva spin-offs such as Shinji Ikari Raising Project, as well as several other Gainax works like Gunbuster and Wings of Honneamise, plus several other anime and manga.
